preamble: The shift from a velar-lateral affricate [kʟ] to a postalveolar fricative [ʃ] involves both a fronting shift and a spirantization. This transformation is part of broader dorsal-lateral weakening and re-analysis processes.

examples.note: Stages in lateral weakening where dorsal-lateral components are reinterpreted as postalveolar sibilants.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
